reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar ! Cómodo! Buena ubicación! Excelente desayuno y restaurante! Está frente al casino.  La atención muy buena!

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place! Comfortable! Great location! Excellent breakfast and restaurant! It's right across from the casino. The service is very good!

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Tener en cuenta salir a colesctora antes viniendo de Buenos Aires porque no tiene salida propia desde Cariños a centrales.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Keep in mind that you'll need to take the main road first if you're coming from Buenos Aires, as there's no direct exit from Cariños to the main bus terminal.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvMTkyaXRnRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Buen Morel lastima que estan un poco. deteriorados las hanitaciones , ademas reciben mascotas que duermen dentro de las habitaciones donde despues duermen niños. QUE MAL

(Translated by Google)
Good Morel, it's a shame the rooms are a bit run down. They also have pets that sleep in the rooms where children sleep. TOO BAD.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvcV95UXRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion tanto en estacion de servicio como en el restaurante. Y en este ultimo variedad, muy buenos platos y precios. Motel: excelente, y con piscina.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both at the gas station and the restaurant. The restaurant offered a wide variety of dishes at very good prices. The motel was excellent and had a pool.

reviews.comment:
